final_prompt.prompt:
Create a vertical short-video cover for an esports monitor product launch.

Style/medium: minimal high-end marketing poster, clean sans-serif typography, Apple-style restraint
Composition: rule-of-thirds grid, large headline occupying upper third, product visual in lower two-thirds
Subject: bold oversized headline "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as the dominant visual element
Scene/backdrop: pure solid background or subtle gradient, generous negative space, no clutter
Color palette: deep black or dark navy base, high-contrast white or electric accent for text, restrained single accent color
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz", "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩"
Constraints: headline must be immediately readable at thumbnail size; vertical 9:16 aspect ratio optimized for mobile screens
Avoid: busy backgrounds, multiple competing fonts, decorative ornaments, gradient overload, generic gaming RGB aesthetic
